name: shadowfell-mausoleum
summary: A tomb on the plane of shadow where grief has weight. Color has drained from stone and wood alike; the mist pools low and never lifts.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: 2:1 processional — sarcophagi or coffins in rows

primary_palette.note: a single honored dead, flanked by pale trees
a monument the tomb was built around

story_prompts: a Raven Queen priestess conducts a silent vigil; the air itself grieves
something shifted inside a sarcophagus — the lid is off by a finger's width
empty, mist-filled — a grave-bell tolls though no hand pulls it
a mourner from the material plane is trapped here, slowly fading into shadow
the obelisk is cracked; shadow leaks out in slow tendrils

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: very dim (0.15-0.25) with pale blue-grey ambient color — cold and leached

anti_patterns: no warm colors — everything is grey, pale blue, bone-white, or drained
never place fire sources with vigor — candles are always guttering, flames always low
mist should always pool at the floor, not hang in sheets
trees here are dead-looking and pale, never green — use shadow-tree or dead-tree
